newsArray.title: Kushal Das, Former General Secretary of AIFF, Passes Away at 66
newsArray.description: Kushal Das, a prominent figure in Indian football and former general secretary of the All India Football Federation (AIFF), died on Friday in New Delhi at the age of 66. His passing occurred at a private hospital, as confirmed by fellow football administrator Shaji Prabhakaran. Das is survived by his wife and two sons. Significant [...]The post Kushal Das, Former General Secretary of AIFF, Passes Away at 66 appeared first on The CSR Journal.

newsArray.title: Kritika Kamra & Gaurav Kapur Celebrate With Bollywood, Cricket Icons
newsArray.description: From viral dance moments to stylish red-carpet appearances, Kritika Kamra and Gaurav Kapur’s Mumbai reception quickly became a social media sensation. The newlyweds welcomed friends from film, television, and cricket, blending both their worlds into a lively celebration that followed their simple and private terrace wedding ceremony.

newsArray.title: Women's Cricket में 'नारी शक्ति' की क्रांति, BBC Report में खुलासा- दोगुनी हुई भागीदारी
newsArray.description: ‘बीबीसी और कलेक्टिव न्यूजरूम’ द्वारा कराए गए एक अध्ययन के अनुसार भारत में महिला क्रिकेट का तेजी से विकास हुआ और 2020 के बाद से 14 राज्यों में महिलाओं की भागीदारी दोगुनी हो गई है। इस अध्ययन में 10,000 से अधिक महिलाओं को शामिल किया गया। इसमें पाया गया कि 2020 में क्रिकेट खेलने वाली महिलाओं की हिस्सेदारी पांच प्रतिशत थी जो अब बढ़कर 10 प्रतिशत हो गई है। वहीं युवा महिलाओं में यह बढ़ोतरी और भी तेजी से हुई है। इसमें 15 से 24 वर्ष के आयु वर्ग में यह छह प्रतिशत से बढ़कर 16 प्रतिशत हो गया है। अध्ययन के अनुसार, ‘‘15 से 24 वर्ष की हर चार में से एक युवती ने खेल को करियर विकल्प के रूप में सोचने पर विचार किया है। ’’ हाल में भारतीय महिला क्रिकेट टीम का प्रदर्शन भी शानदार रहा है। टीम ने अपना पहला वनडे विश्व कप जीता और लगभग एक दशक में पहली बार ऑस्ट्रेलिया को तीन मैच की द्विपक्षीय टी20 अंतरराष्ट्रीय श्रृंखला में हराया। खेल की लोकप्रियता बढ़ाने में इस सफलता का भी योगदान हो सकता है। क्रिकेट ने पारंपरिक खेल कबड्डी को भी काफी बड़े अंतर से पीछे छोड़ दिया है जो लंबे समय से भारत के ग्रामीण इलाकों में लोकप्रिय रहा है। अध्ययन में कहा गया, ‘‘जिन राज्यों में अध्ययन किया गया, उनमें महिलाओं के बीच सबसे अधिक खेले जाने वाले खेल के रूप में क्रिकेट अपनी स्थिति और मजबूत कर चुका है। 2020 में यह कबड्डी से केवल मामूली अंतर से आगे था लेकिन अब क्रिकेट काफी आगे पहुंच गया है। ’’इसके अनुसार, ‘‘अधिकांश क्षेत्रों में भागीदारी बढ़ी है। सर्वे किए गए राज्यों में से केवल दो को छोड़कर सभी में महिलाओं द्वारा क्रिकेट खेलने की संख्या में वृद्धि दर्ज की गई। उत्तर प्रदेश में भागीदारी 10 गुना बढ़कर एक से 10 प्रतिशत हो गई है। साथ ही इन राज्यों में क्रिकेट खेलने में महिलाओं और पुरुषों के बीच का अंतर भी कम हुआ है। ’’ अध्ययन से यह भी पता चला कि तीन पुरुषों के मुकाबले अब एक महिला क्रिकेट खिलाड़ी है जबकि 2020 में यह अनुपात पांच पुरुष और एक महिला का था। करियर के संदर्भ में 15 से 24 वर्ष की 26 प्रतिशत युवतियों ने खेल में करियर बनाने पर विचार किया है जो 2020 में 16 प्रतिशत था। सबसे अधिक प्रतिशत तमिलनाडु (27 प्रतिशत), मध्य प्रदेश (19 प्रतिशत) और मेघालय (19 प्रतिशत) में दर्ज किया गया। सर्वे में शामिल महिलाओं के बीच बैडमिंटन में भी भागीदारी बढ़ी है, विशेषकर पंजाब, आंध्र प्रदेश और तेलंगाना में। इसके अनुसार अगर सुरक्षा से जुड़ी चिंताओं का सही समाधान किया जाए तो और अधिक महिलाएं खेलों की ओर आकर्षित हो सकती हैं। अध्ययन के अनुसार, ‘‘जो महिलाएं कोई खेल नहीं खेलतीं, उनमें से 13 प्रतिशत ने सुरक्षा संबंधी चिंताओं को बाधा बताया। ’’कलेक्टिव न्यूजरूम की सह-संस्थापक और प्रधान संपादक रूपा झा ने कहा, ‘‘ये नतीजे प्रगति और लगातार आने वाली चुनौतियां दोनों दिखाते हैं। हालांकि भागीदारी और दर्शकों की संख्या तेजी से बढ़ रही है, फिर भी रूढ़िवादी सोच और व्यावहारिक चुनौतियां अब भी बनी हुई हैं। ’’ उन्होंने कहा, ‘‘हम उम्मीद करते हैं कि यह डेटा महिला खिलाड़ियों के समर्थन के लिए आगे और चर्चा और कदम उठाने को प्रेरित करेगा।
keywords: indian women's cricket, women in sports, cricket participation study, sports career india, gender gap cricket, youth sports trends, india sports analysis, women's cricket growth, bbc sports report, cricket popularity india, भारतीय महिला क्रिकेट, खेल जगत में महिलाएं, क्रिकेट में भागीदारी का अध्ययन, भारत में खेल करियर, क्रिकेट में लैंगिक अंतर, युवा खेल रुझान, भारत में खेल विश्लेषण, महिला क्रिकेट का विकास, बीबीसी खेल रिपोर्ट, भारत में क्रिकेट की लोकप्रियता
creator: प्रभासाक्षी न्यूज नेटवर्क

newsArray.title: 'Skill sets like his are rare in the UK': Dinesh Karthik on why London Spirit paid £390,000 for James Coles
newsArray.description: Dinesh Karthik said London Spirit went all out for James Coles at The Hundred auction because of his rare all-round skill set. The 21-year-old was signed for £390,000 after a bidding war between five teams, with Karthik backing the Sussex youngster to handle the price tag and emerge as a future prospect for England.

newsArray.title: Will Sanju Samson be able to make ODI comeback in Indian team?
newsArray.description: Former India cricketer WV Raman believes that Sanju Samson has done enough to earn a place in India’s ODI squad following the team’s triumph in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026. With the national side gradually building towards the ICC Cricket World Cup 2027 in South Africa, discussions around strengthening the 50-over team have intensified.India’s head coach Gautam Gambhir recently acknowledged that the team needs improvement in ODIs after suffering back-to-back defeats in bilateral series. While the T20I setup appears stable, the management is looking at players who impressed during the World Cup campaign, including Samson and Ishan Kishan.In a recent interaction, Raman expressed confidence that Samson can replicate his T20 success in the longer white-ball format. The wicketkeeper-batter has an impressive ODI record so far, scoring 510 runs in 16 matches at an average of 56.66 and a strike rate close to 100, which includes three fifties and a century. Raman also pointed out that Samson has matured as a cricketer and appears to have overcome earlier concerns about temperament.According to Raman, players who are in good form should always find a place in the playing XI, even if the team management has to reshuffle the batting order to accommodate them.Also Read: From Rejection to glory: Sanju Samson’s quiet moment after T20 World Cup winMeanwhile, former national selector Devang Gandhi offered a different perspective. He believes Samson’s return to the ODI side may be difficult because the top order already has strong contenders. Gandhi mentioned that Yashasvi Jaiswal is also waiting for an opportunity and suggested that Samson should focus on performing in domestic one-day tournaments to strengthen his case for selection.Gandhi also highlighted the presence of Rishabh Pant in the ODI setup, questioning why the wicketkeeper-batter should be dropped given his performances. He noted that Kishan remains a flexible option in the batting lineup, capable of playing in the top three or further down the order, and can also act as a backup wicketkeeper to KL Rahul.The upcoming season of the Indian Premier League could play a key role in shaping the selectors’ decisions. Samson is expected to open the innings for Chennai Super Kings, while Kishan is likely to bat at number three for Sunrisers Hyderabad, performances that could influence India’s future ODI plans.
creator: rajendra mohapatra

newsArray.title: Salman Ali Agha Throws His Helmet In Anger After Controversial Run Out In BAN vs PAK 2nd ODI - Watch
newsArray.description: BAN vs PAK 2nd ODI: The second ODI between Bangladesh and Pakistan at the Sher-e-Bangla National Stadium was transformed from a tactical cricket match into a theater of geopolitical tension on Friday. A bizarre and highly contentious run-out involving Salman Ali Agha has not only potentially decided the series but has reignited the age-old debate over the "Spirit of Cricket" versus the letter of the law.Watch VideoCrucial moment! Mehidy Hasan Miraz removes Salman Agha with a brilliant run-out. ⚡🏏#BCB #Cricket #Bangladesh #Pakistan #ODI pic.twitter.com/N0inKkZVwz— Bangladesh Cricket (@BCBtigers) March 13, 2026The Collision at the Non-Striker’s EndThe incident occurred during the 39th over of Pakistan’s innings. Mohammad Rizwan struck a delivery from Bangladesh captain Mehidy Hasan Miraz back toward the non-striker’s end. The ball deflected off Salman Ali Agha’s bat as he scrambled to return to his crease, momentarily colliding with Miraz in the follow-through.Believing the play had concluded and the ball was "dead," Agha attempted a gesture of sportsmanship: he reached down to pick up the ball and hand it back to the bowler. However, Miraz intercepted the ball himself and immediately dislodged the bails.Under the strict laws of the game, the ball is not dead until both the fielding side and the batters consider it so. By reaching for the ball while outside his crease, Agha inadvertently placed himself in jeopardy.A Field of FuryThe reaction was instantaneous. As Bangladesh appealed, Agha was visibly incensed, engaging in a heated verbal exchange with Miraz and wicketkeeper Liton Das. The tension escalated to the point where Rizwan was forced to physically intervene, acting as a peacemaker as Agha reportedly hurled a series of "choice words" at the Bangladesh eleven.Upon review, third umpire Tanvir Ahmed upheld the appeal. Agha’s departure was punctuated by a rare show of public frustration; the batter threw his helmet and gloves to the turf before storming back to the pavilion.The Turning PointThe psychological blow proved more damaging than the scorecard entry. Before the controversy, Pakistan sat comfortably at 231-3 after 38.3 overs, poised for a massive total. Following the dismissal, the innings collapsed in spectacular fashion.Shaken by the incident, the visitors lost four wickets in the next 23 deliveries, a tailspin that allowed Bangladesh to seize control of the match and, potentially, the three-match series.
creator: prateek thakur

महिलाओं द्वारा क्रिकेट खेलने की संख्या में वृद्धि दर्ज की गई। उत्तर प्रदेश में भागीदारी 10 गुना बढ़कर एक से 10 प्रतिशत हो गई है। साथ ही इन राज्यों में क्रिकेट खेलने में महिलाओं और पुरुषों के बीच का अंतर भी कम हुआ है। ’’ अध्ययन से यह भी पता चला कि तीन पुरुषों के मुकाबले अब एक महिला क्रिकेट खिलाड़ी है जबकि 2020 में यह अनुपात पांच पुरुष और एक महिला का था। करियर के संदर्भ में 15 से 24 वर्ष की 26 प्रतिशत युवतियों ने खेल में करियर बनाने पर विचार किया है जो 2020 में 16 प्रतिशत था। सबसे अधिक प्रतिशत तमिलनाडु (27 प्रतिशत), मध्य प्रदेश (19 प्रतिशत) और मेघालय (19 प्रतिशत) में दर्ज किया गया। सर्वे में शामिल महिलाओं के बीच बैडमिंटन में भी भागीदारी बढ़ी है, विशेषकर पंजाब, आंध्र प्रदेश और तेलंगाना में। इसके अनुसार अगर सुरक्षा से जुड़ी चिंताओं का सही समाधान किया जाए तो और अधिक महिलाएं खेलों की ओर आकर्षित हो सकती हैं। अध्ययन के अनुसार, ‘‘जो महिलाएं कोई खेल नहीं खेलतीं, उनमें से 13 प्रतिशत ने सुरक्षा संबंधी चिंताओं को बाधा बताया। ’’कलेक्टिव न्यूजरूम की सह-संस्थापक और प्रधान संपादक रूपा झा ने कहा, ‘‘ये नतीजे प्रगति और लगातार आने वाली चुनौतियां दोनों दिखाते हैं। हालांकि भागीदारी और दर्शकों की संख्या तेजी से बढ़ रही है, फिर भी रूढ़िवादी सोच और व्यावहारिक चुनौतियां अब भी बनी हुई हैं। ’’ उन्होंने कहा, ‘‘हम उम्मीद करते हैं कि यह डेटा महिला खिलाड़ियों के समर्थन के लिए आगे और चर्चा और कदम उठाने को प्रेरित करेगा।

newsArray.title: 'Skill sets like his are rare in the UK': Dinesh Karthik on why London Spirit paid £390,000 for James Coles
newsArray.description: Dinesh Karthik said London Spirit went all out for James Coles at The Hundred auction because of his rare all-round skill set. The 21-year-old was signed for £390,000 after a bidding war between five teams, with Karthik backing the Sussex youngster to handle the price tag and emerge as a future prospect for England.

newsArray.title: Will Sanju Samson be able to make ODI comeback in Indian team?
newsArray.description: Former India cricketer WV Raman believes that Sanju Samson has done enough to earn a place in India’s ODI squad following the team’s triumph in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026. With the national side gradually building towards the ICC Cricket World Cup 2027 in South Africa, discussions around strengthening the 50-over team have intensified.India’s head coach Gautam Gambhir recently acknowledged that the team needs improvement in ODIs after suffering back-to-back defeats in bilateral series. While the T20I setup appears stable, the management is looking at players who impressed during the World Cup campaign, including Samson and Ishan Kishan.In a recent interaction, Raman expressed confidence that Samson can replicate his T20 success in the longer white-ball format. The wicketkeeper-batter has an impressive ODI record so far, scoring 510 runs in 16 matches at an average of 56.66 and a strike rate close to 100, which includes three fifties and a century. Raman also pointed out that Samson has matured as a cricketer and appears to have overcome earlier concerns about temperament.According to Raman, players who are in good form should always find a place in the playing XI, even if the team management has to reshuffle the batting order to accommodate them.Also Read: From Rejection to glory: Sanju Samson’s quiet moment after T20 World Cup winMeanwhile, former national selector Devang Gandhi offered a different perspective. He believes Samson’s return to the ODI side may be difficult because the top order already has strong contenders. Gandhi mentioned that Yashasvi Jaiswal is also waiting for an opportunity and suggested that Samson should focus on performing in domestic one-day tournaments to strengthen his case for selection.Gandhi also highlighted the presence of Rishabh Pant in the ODI setup, questioning why the wicketkeeper-batter should be dropped given his performances. He noted that Kishan remains a flexible option in the batting lineup, capable of playing in the top three or further down the order, and can also act as a backup wicketkeeper to KL Rahul.The upcoming season of the Indian Premier League could play a key role in shaping the selectors’ decisions. Samson is expected to open the innings for Chennai Super Kings, while Kishan is likely to bat at number three for Sunrisers Hyderabad, performances that could influence India’s future ODI plans.
creator: rajendra mohapatra

newsArray.title: Salman Ali Agha Throws His Helmet In Anger After Controversial Run Out In BAN vs PAK 2nd ODI - Watch
newsArray.description: BAN vs PAK 2nd ODI: The second ODI between Bangladesh and Pakistan at the Sher-e-Bangla National Stadium was transformed from a tactical cricket match into a theater of geopolitical tension on Friday. A bizarre and highly contentious run-out involving Salman Ali Agha has not only potentially decided the series but has reignited the age-old debate over the "Spirit of Cricket" versus the letter of the law.Watch VideoCrucial moment! Mehidy Hasan Miraz removes Salman Agha with a brilliant run-out. ⚡🏏#BCB #Cricket #Bangladesh #Pakistan #ODI pic.twitter.com/N0inKkZVwz— Bangladesh Cricket (@BCBtigers) March 13, 2026The Collision at the Non-Striker’s EndThe incident occurred during the 39th over of Pakistan’s innings. Mohammad Rizwan struck a delivery from Bangladesh captain Mehidy Hasan Miraz back toward the non-striker’s end. The ball deflected off Salman Ali Agha’s bat as he scrambled to return to his crease, momentarily colliding with Miraz in the follow-through.Believing the play had concluded and the ball was "dead," Agha attempted a gesture of sportsmanship: he reached down to pick up the ball and hand it back to the bowler. However, Miraz intercepted the ball himself and immediately dislodged the bails.Under the strict laws of the game, the ball is not dead until both the fielding side and the batters consider it so. By reaching for the ball while outside his crease, Agha inadvertently placed himself in jeopardy.A Field of FuryThe reaction was instantaneous. As Bangladesh appealed, Agha was visibly incensed, engaging in a heated verbal exchange with Miraz and wicketkeeper Liton Das. The tension escalated to the point where Rizwan was forced to physically intervene, acting as a peacemaker as Agha reportedly hurled a series of "choice words" at the Bangladesh eleven.Upon review, third umpire Tanvir Ahmed upheld the appeal. Agha’s departure was punctuated by a rare show of public frustration; the batter threw his helmet and gloves to the turf before storming back to the pavilion.The Turning PointThe psychological blow proved more damaging than the scorecard entry. Before the controversy, Pakistan sat comfortably at 231-3 after 38.3 overs, poised for a massive total. Following the dismissal, the innings collapsed in spectacular fashion.Shaken by the incident, the visitors lost four wickets in the next 23 deliveries, a tailspin that allowed Bangladesh to seize control of the match and, potentially, the three-match series.
creator: prateek thakur

newsArray.title: Women's Cricket में 'नारी शक्ति' की क्रांति, BBC Report में खुलासा- दोगुनी हुई भागीदारी
newsArray.description: ‘बीबीसी और कलेक्टिव न्यूजरूम’ द्वारा कराए गए एक अध्ययन के अनुसार भारत में महिला क्रिकेट का तेजी से विकास हुआ और 2020 के बाद से 14 राज्यों में महिलाओं की भागीदारी दोगुनी हो गई है। इस अध्ययन में 10,000 से अधिक महिलाओं को शामिल किया गया। इसमें पाया गया कि 2020 में क्रिकेट खेलने वाली महिलाओं की हिस्सेदारी पांच प्रतिशत थी जो अब बढ़कर 10 प्रतिशत हो गई है। वहीं युवा महिलाओं में यह बढ़ोतरी और भी तेजी से हुई है। इसमें 15 से 24 वर्ष के आयु वर्ग में यह छह प्रतिशत से बढ़कर 16 प्रतिशत हो गया है। अध्ययन के अनुसार, ‘‘15 से 24 वर्ष की हर चार में से एक युवती ने खेल को करियर विकल्प के रूप में सोचने पर विचार किया है। ’’ हाल में भारतीय महिला क्रिकेट टीम का प्रदर्शन भी शानदार रहा है। टीम ने अपना पहला वनडे विश्व कप जीता और लगभग एक दशक में पहली बार ऑस्ट्रेलिया को तीन मैच की द्विपक्षीय टी20 अंतरराष्ट्रीय श्रृंखला में हराया। खेल की लोकप्रियता बढ़ाने में इस सफलता का भी योगदान हो सकता है। क्रिकेट ने पारंपरिक खेल कबड्डी को भी काफी बड़े अंतर से पीछे छोड़ दिया है जो लंबे समय से भारत के ग्रामीण इलाकों में लोकप्रिय रहा है। अध्ययन में कहा गया, ‘‘जिन राज्यों में अध्ययन किया गया, उनमें महिलाओं के बीच सबसे अधिक खेले जाने वाले खेल के रूप में क्रिकेट अपनी स्थिति और मजबूत कर चुका है। 2020 में यह कबड्डी से केवल मामूली अंतर से आगे था लेकिन अब क्रिकेट काफी आगे पहुंच गया है। ’’इसके अनुसार, ‘‘अधिकांश क्षेत्रों में भागीदारी बढ़ी है। सर्वे किए गए राज्यों में से केवल दो को छोड़कर सभी में महिलाओं द्वारा क्रिकेट खेलने की संख्या में वृद्धि दर्ज की गई। उत्तर प्रदेश में भागीदारी 10 गुना बढ़कर एक से 10 प्रतिशत हो गई है। साथ ही इन राज्यों में क्रिकेट खेलने में महिलाओं और पुरुषों के बीच का अंतर भी कम हुआ है। ’’ अध्ययन से यह भी पता चला कि तीन पुरुषों के मुकाबले अब एक महिला क्रिकेट खिलाड़ी है जबकि 2020 में यह अनुपात पांच पुरुष और एक महिला का था। करियर के संदर्भ में 15 से 24 वर्ष की 26 प्रतिशत युवतियों ने खेल में करियर बनाने पर विचार किया है जो 2020 में 16 प्रतिशत था। सबसे अधिक प्रतिशत तमिलनाडु (27 प्रतिशत), मध्य प्रदेश (19 प्रतिशत) और मेघालय (19 प्रतिशत) में दर्ज किया गया। सर्वे में शामिल महिलाओं के बीच बैडमिंटन में भी भागीदारी बढ़ी है, विशेषकर पंजाब, आंध्र प्रदेश और तेलंगाना में। इसके अनुसार अगर सुरक्षा से जुड़ी चिंताओं का सही समाधान किया जाए तो और अधिक महिलाएं खेलों की ओर आकर्षित हो सकती हैं। अध्ययन के अनुसार, ‘‘जो महिलाएं कोई खेल नहीं खेलतीं, उनमें से 13 प्रतिशत ने सुरक्षा संबंधी चिंताओं को बाधा बताया। ’’कलेक्टिव न्यूजरूम की सह-संस्थापक और प्रधान संपादक रूपा झा ने कहा, ‘‘ये नतीजे प्रगति और लगातार आने वाली चुनौतियां दोनों दिखाते हैं। हालांकि भागीदारी और दर्शकों की संख्या तेजी से बढ़ रही है, फिर भी रूढ़िवादी सोच और व्यावहारिक चुनौतियां अब भी बनी हुई हैं। ’’ उन्होंने कहा, ‘‘हम उम्मीद करते हैं कि यह डेटा महिला खिलाड़ियों के समर्थन के लिए आगे और चर्चा और कदम उठाने को प्रेरित करेगा।

newsArray.title: Will Sanju Samson be able to make ODI comeback in Indian team?
newsArray.description: Former India cricketer WV Raman believes that Sanju Samson has done enough to earn a place in India’s ODI squad following the team’s triumph in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026. With the national side gradually building towards the ICC Cricket World Cup 2027 in South Africa, discussions around strengthening the 50-over team have intensified.India’s head coach Gautam Gambhir recently acknowledged that the team needs improvement in ODIs after suffering back-to-back defeats in bilateral series. While the T20I setup appears stable, the management is looking at players who impressed during the World Cup campaign, including Samson and Ishan Kishan.In a recent interaction, Raman expressed confidence that Samson can replicate his T20 success in the longer white-ball format. The wicketkeeper-batter has an impressive ODI record so far, scoring 510 runs in 16 matches at an average of 56.66 and a strike rate close to 100, which includes three fifties and a century. Raman also pointed out that Samson has matured as a cricketer and appears to have overcome earlier concerns about temperament.According to Raman, players who are in good form should always find a place in the playing XI, even if the team management has to reshuffle the batting order to accommodate them.Also Read: From Rejection to glory: Sanju Samson’s quiet moment after T20 World Cup winMeanwhile, former national selector Devang Gandhi offered a different perspective. He believes Samson’s return to the ODI side may be difficult because the top order already has strong contenders. Gandhi mentioned that Yashasvi Jaiswal is also waiting for an opportunity and suggested that Samson should focus on performing in domestic one-day tournaments to strengthen his case for selection.Gandhi also highlighted the presence of Rishabh Pant in the ODI setup, questioning why the wicketkeeper-batter should be dropped given his performances. He noted that Kishan remains a flexible option in the batting lineup, capable of playing in the top three or further down the order, and can also act as a backup wicketkeeper to KL Rahul.The upcoming season of the Indian Premier League could play a key role in shaping the selectors’ decisions. Samson is expected to open the innings for Chennai Super Kings, while Kishan is likely to bat at number three for Sunrisers Hyderabad, performances that could influence India’s future ODI plans.
creator: rajendra mohapatra

newsArray.title: Millwall trip to West Brom moved for television coverage in fourth straight away fixture change
newsArray.description: MILLWALL’S trip to West Bromwich Albion has been moved for television coverage and will now take place on Friday, April 10 (kick-off 8pm). The clash at The Hawthorns was initially scheduled for Saturday, April 11, but has been moved for Sky Sports Football coverage. The match is the latest away trip moved for television, following [...]

newsArray.title: Salman Ali Agha Throws His Helmet In Anger After Controversial Run Out In BAN vs PAK 2nd ODI - Watch
newsArray.description: BAN vs PAK 2nd ODI: The second ODI between Bangladesh and Pakistan at the Sher-e-Bangla National Stadium was transformed from a tactical cricket match into a theater of geopolitical tension on Friday. A bizarre and highly contentious run-out involving Salman Ali Agha has not only potentially decided the series but has reignited the age-old debate over the "Spirit of Cricket" versus the letter of the law.Watch VideoCrucial moment! Mehidy Hasan Miraz removes Salman Agha with a brilliant run-out. ⚡🏏#BCB #Cricket #Bangladesh #Pakistan #ODI pic.twitter.com/N0inKkZVwz— Bangladesh Cricket (@BCBtigers) March 13, 2026The Collision at the Non-Striker’s EndThe incident occurred during the 39th over of Pakistan’s innings. Mohammad Rizwan struck a delivery from Bangladesh captain Mehidy Hasan Miraz back toward the non-striker’s end. The ball deflected off Salman Ali Agha’s bat as he scrambled to return to his crease, momentarily colliding with Miraz in the follow-through.Believing the play had concluded and the ball was "dead," Agha attempted a gesture of sportsmanship: he reached down to pick up the ball and hand it back to the bowler. However, Miraz intercepted the ball himself and immediately dislodged the bails.Under the strict laws of the game, the ball is not dead until both the fielding side and the batters consider it so. By reaching for the ball while outside his crease, Agha inadvertently placed himself in jeopardy.A Field of FuryThe reaction was instantaneous. As Bangladesh appealed, Agha was visibly incensed, engaging in a heated verbal exchange with Miraz and wicketkeeper Liton Das. The tension escalated to the point where Rizwan was forced to physically intervene, acting as a peacemaker as Agha reportedly hurled a series of "choice words" at the Bangladesh eleven.Upon review, third umpire Tanvir Ahmed upheld the appeal. Agha’s departure was punctuated by a rare show of public frustration; the batter threw his helmet and gloves to the turf before storming back to the pavilion.The Turning PointThe psychological blow proved more damaging than the scorecard entry. Before the controversy, Pakistan sat comfortably at 231-3 after 38.3 overs, poised for a massive total. Following the dismissal, the innings collapsed in spectacular fashion.Shaken by the incident, the visitors lost four wickets in the next 23 deliveries, a tailspin that allowed Bangladesh to seize control of the match and, potentially, the three-match series.
creator: prateek thakur
